title: Clip Frame A4 Size Frameless Picture Frame Photo Poster Certificate with Crystal Clear Non Glass Shatter Resistant Safety Styrene Perspex Ready to Use (A4 Size - 210mm x 297mm – Pack of 1)
features: Habercrafts A4 Size Clip Frame Measures 210 x 297mm And Made From Thick 4mm MDF Wooden Backing, Crystal Clear Styrene Glass And Durable Metal Fastening

Sleek And Modern Our Clip Frames Will Hold Your Item Safe And Secure With Its Non Glass Break And Shatter Resistant Cover, So You Can Display Your Pictures With A Contemporary Minimalist Design Without Being Distracted From The Photo
Our Versatile Frames Have A Wide Range Of Uses From Framing Posters, Photos, Pictures And Comics To Displaying Certificates, Prints, Artwork And Keep Sakes

Hang In Both Portrait And Landscape Orientations, These Lightweight, And Contemporary Frames Are Perfect For Home, School, Office, And More. Frames Are Individually Wrapped, Packaged With Protective Corners And A Clear Peel Off Film To Protected Against Scratches, Dirt Or Damage Before Use

Available In Sizes A1 (594 x 841mm), A2 (420 x 594mm), A3 (297 x 420mm), A4 (210 x 297mm) & A5 (148 x 210mm) In Packs Of 1 To 24 So You Can Always Get The Best Price No Matter The Size Of Your Project
description: Product Description Each Piece Includes A Clear Styrene Facing & MDF Backing As Well As Clips For Easy Hanging These Frameless Frames Are Perfect For Posters, Pictures, Prints, Art & More Sleek And Simple Minimalist Frameless Design Family Run UK Business We serve customers all over the world and take pride in providing our customers with fantastic products. We hope you have a pleasant experience at Habercrafts.
